description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this olive green hobo bag from fastrack will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall or to college. It's large enough to hold all your essentials and attractive enough to get you appreciative glances.Made of nylon for enhanced durabilityPleated look for added attractionOne large and roomy main compartment with a small zippered pocket and two smaller pouches Graphic print all overshort handles for snug carrying easePiping on handles for added attractionBranded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long lifeCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
